title: PCR Prep
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: This protocol performs PCR prep on up to 384 samples
steps.instruction: This protocol performs PCR prep on up to 384 samples. NTC with PCR mastermix will be plated in wells P17-19. cDNA IPC template will be plated in wells P20-22, and NTC with IPC mastermix will be plated in wells P23-24.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
